news.headline: Faraday Future (Nasdaq: FFIE) approved for Nasdaq listing, must comply with reporting by July 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFIE) disclosed receiving notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on June 26, 2024. The Nasdaq Hearings Panel has approved the company's appeal for ongoing listing on Nasdaq, contingent on meeting the periodic reporting obligation by July 31, 2024. Faraday Future is a California-based firm focusing on a global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem.

news.headline: Benson Hill receives non-binding offer from Argonautic to acquire all outstanding shares of common stock.
news.summary: A preliminary, non-binding offer has been presented to Benson Hill, Inc. to acquire all outstanding shares of common stock. The offer is currently under consideration in St. Louis.

news.headline: Murphy Oil Corp announces Q2 earnings call on August 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. EDT. Results to be released that morning.
news.summary: Houston-based Murphy Oil Corporation (NYSE: MUR) is set to hold a conference call and webcast on Thursday, August 8, 2024, starting at 9:00 a.m. EDT to review their second quarter 2024 earnings. The financial and operating results are scheduled for release before the market opens on the same day. Interested parties can access the webcast link and presentation material on the Investor Relations page of the company's website at http://ir.murphyoilcorp.com.

news.headline: KittyHawk appoints Alexandra Peterson as new Partner, bringing extensive experience to tech investment firm.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Los Angeles, KittyHawk, a technology investment firm focusing on backing innovative seed to late-stage pre-IPO companies, welcomed Alexandra Peterson as a Partner. With this appointment, Alexandra brings her wealth of experience and expertise to the firm.

news.headline: Nutex Health to implement 1-for-10 reverse stock split on July 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Houston on June 27, 2024, Nutex Health Inc. revealed a 1-for-10 reverse stock split of its common stock (NASDAQ: NUTX). This decision will come into effect as of the market opening on July 3, 2024. The reverse stock split will have legal implications starting...

news.headline: AZZ Inc. declares $0.17/share cash dividend for Q1 fiscal year 2025; Continues leading with galvanizing, coil coating.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on June 27, 2024, AZZ Inc., a major player in hot-dip galvanizing and coil coating services, disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.17 per share for the first quarter. AZZ Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AZZ.

news.headline: Carisma Therapeutics nominates first CAR-M candidate for hepatocellular carcinoma under Moderna collaboration, triggering $2M payment.
news.summary: A potential treatment candidate focusing on Glypican-3 for solid tumors, such as hepatocellular carcinoma, has been identified. This nomination has led to a $2 million milestone payment being awarded to Carisma. This update comes from Carisma Therapeutics Inc., listed as Nasdaq: CARM, based in Philadelphia. The news was announced on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Ball Corp (NYSE: BALL) to announce Q2 earnings on Aug 1, 2024, before NYSE trading begins. Conference at 9 am MT/11 am ET.
news.summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) is scheduled to disclose its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on Thursday, August 1, 2024. The announcement will be made before the start of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The earnings report will be released at 9 a.m. Mountain time, which is 11 a.m. Eastern time. This is an important update for investors and analysts tracking the company's performance.

news.headline: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) appoints Graham Smith as new independent director on June 26, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Tempe, Arizona, GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) announced the appointment of Graham Smith as a new independent director. This decision by the board of directors was unanimously approved and is effective as of June 26, 2024. Smith will serve as a Class I director until the company's 2025 annual meeting of stockholders.

news.headline: Aircastle to report Q1 2024 results on July 11, 2024. Period ended May 31, before market opens.
news.summary: Aircastle Limited, based in Stamford, Connecticut, is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter ending on May 31, 2024, on July 11, 2024, before the market opens. Management will be releasing the details in a press release on that day.

news.headline: Global exfoliators and scrubs market to grow by USD 658.7 million by 2028 at 4.36% CAGR due to demand for skin-lightening products.
news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the worldwide exfoliators and scrubs market is projected to expand by approximately USD 658.7 million between 2024 and 2028, as per findings from Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is expected to experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.36%. This growth is driven by an increasing interest in skin-lightening products and treatments.

news.headline: The Federal Reserve issued $7.03 billion in discount-window loans in the week ending June 26, up from $6.68 billion the week before.
GXO and Agility Robotics sign agreement for Robots-as-a-Service at SPANX facility, integrating Humanoid robots - industry-first deal.
news.summary: A recent partnership involving Robots-as-a-Service (RaaS) has seen Agility’s Humanoid robots being integrated with other collaborative robots (cobots) at a SPANX facility. This agreement aims to maximize efficiency and productivity by combining the unique capabilities of these robots. The collaboration will enable the facility to benefit from the diverse skills and functionalities brought by the robots. This move underscores the increasing trend of automation in various industries.

news.headline: Ingersoll Rand unveils its 2023 Sustainability Report showcasing accelerated progress and new goals for sustainability. #IR #Sustainability #Goals
news.summary: In Davidson, North Carolina on June 27, 2024, Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR), a worldwide supplier of critical flow creation and solutions for life science and industrial sectors, has released its 2023 Sustainability Report titled “Leading Sustainably through execution.” The report outlines the company's dedication, steps taken, and achievements towards a more sustainable future. The approach is steered by Ingersoll Rand Execution Excellence (IRX) and a mindset of ownership, demonstrating the company's commitment to sustainability strategies.

news.headline: SC rejects move to shield Sacklers from civil claims in opioid crisis, jeopardizing deal.
news.summary: The Supreme Court dismissed a bankruptcy agreement that sought to shield the Sackler family from lawsuits tied to the opioid crisis. The move means that members of the Sackler family cannot evade civil claims linked to the epidemic.

news.headline: $106.6 billion in term funding loans from Fed bank in week ended June 26th, down from $107.3 billion prior week.
iAnthus reports results from Annual General Meeting. Company owns cannabis operations in US. (Characters: 87)
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, iAnthus Capital Holdings, Inc. (CSE: IAN) (OTCQB: ITHUF), a company involved in regulated cannabis operations in the US, announced its results for the Annual General meeting.

news.headline: SITE Centers Corp. released its 2023 Corporate Sustainability Report, the 10th overall, following GRI Standards.
news.summary: In Beachwood, Ohio, SITE Centers Corp. (NYSE:SITC), a company that owns open-air shopping centers in affluent suburban areas, has unveiled its 2023 Corporate Sustainability Report (CSR). This marks their tenth sustainability report, with eight of them aligning with the Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Standards. The report offers insight into SITE Centers’ corporate responsibility and sustainability initiatives.

news.headline: Pure Strategies launches Pure Supply™ platform for supply chain impact; enhances sustainability programs for brands & retailers.
news.summary: A sustainability consulting firm based in Gloucester, Massachusetts, recently announced their efforts in assisting companies to enhance their approach in engaging suppliers. Pure Strategies is dedicated to helping brands and retailers maximize their supplier engagement strategies to further their climate goals and sustainability initiatives. The consultancy aims to collaborate with businesses to strengthen their sustainability programs. This update was disclosed on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Actelis secures $300,000+ order for Italian transportation project, boosting international growth.
news.summary: Actelis has confirmed a recent order exceeding $300,000 for the backing of a crucial national transportation infrastructure endeavor in Italy.

news.headline: Chewy shares surge after Roaring Kitty tweet boosts pet-care sector, impacting stocks on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, Roaring Kitty (also known as Keith Gill) demonstrated the ability to impact the stock prices of companies beyond GameStop, such as Chewy and other pet-care companies.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency markets see gains before U.S. debate; Bitcoin at $61,464.37 (+1%), Eth $3,449.60 (+2%), Solana $148.18 (+8.5%), Dogecoin $0.1244 (+0.6%). Large transactions up 15.9%, but netflows down 196.5%. $91.8M liquidated in 24hrs, BlackRock buys Bitcoin.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing an increase in prices leading up to the Trump-Biden U.S. Presidential election debate, with the main catalyst being the Solana spot ETF application. The current prices for the top cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin stands at $61,464.37, showing a 1% gain, Ethereum is at $3,449.60 with a 2% increase, Solana is at $148.18 displaying an 8.5% climb, Dogecoin is at $0.1244 with a 0.6% rise, and Shiba Inu is at $0.0000175 with a 1.5% uptick. Notable statistics reveal a 15.9% surge in large transaction volume, alongside a 196.5% decrease in exchange netflows in a single day. Coinglass data indicates that 34,732 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses totaling $91.8 million within the past 24 hours. Additionally, Radar data shows that BlackRock has acquired Bitcoin for its Global Allocation Fund based on an SEC filing, making it the third internal fund in BlackRock to invest in Bitcoin. (Note: Full story available on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Doug Leonardo will lead the new TGH Behavioral Health Hospital, set to open in 2025 in Tampa, Florida. Expanding access to services and training the state's workforce.
news.summary: The TGH Behavioral Health Hospital is set to launch in 2025 in Tampa, Florida. This facility aims to enhance access to top-tier behavioral health services and educate the state's upcoming behavioral health professionals. Tampa General Hospital (TGH), the sole academic health institution in the region, announced these plans on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. declares C$0.02 as third quarterly dividend for 2024. Pleasing news for investors.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 27, 2024, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. declared a cash dividend of C$0.02 per share, marking the third quarterly dividend of 2024. The company, also known as Sandstorm Gold Royalties, operates under the tickers NYSE: SAND and TSX: SSL.

news.headline: Dealerlogix by Vehlo joins GM's Service Lane Tool Program with its fixed operations software for dealerships, offering various services including text communication and service scheduling.
news.summary: A company called Dealerlogix, based in Knoxville, Tennessee, and powered by Vehlo, has been given approval by General Motors to partake in its Service Lane Tool Program. Dealerlogix offers a comprehensive fixed operations software suite tailored for automotive dealership service departments. The suite includes services such as retention text communications via its Text2Drive product, online service scheduling, service valet, and service lane check-in. This approval from General Motors signifies a significant endorsement for Dealerlogix and its all-in-one solution for dealership fixed operations.

news.headline: ClearanceJobs partners with U.S. Department of Labor to assist transitioning service members and spouses in finding cleared jobs.
news.summary: A recent announcement from a company based in Centennial, Colorado reveals a new collaboration between ClearanceJobs and the Department of Labor. The partnership aims to assist transitioning service members and their spouses in securing cleared jobs following their military service. This initiative is significant as it will provide valuable employment opportunities for individuals transitioning from the military.

news.headline: BWX Technologies to announce Q2 2024 results on Aug 5 after market close. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. EDT, dial-in: U.S. 1-888-596-4144, International 1-646-968-2525.
news.summary: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) will be releasing their second quarter 2024 results on Monday, August 5, 2024, after the market closes. Following this, they will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. EDT. Interested parties can tune in for the call and access the presentation slides online at www.bwxt.com/investors. Participants can join the call at the specified time using the dial-in numbers: (U.S.) 1-888-596-4144 and (International) 1-646-968-2525 with the conference ID: 7880317. A replay of the conference call will be available for those who may have missed it.

news.headline: Culp, Inc. reported $49.5M net sales for Q4 2024, down 19.4%. Mattress fabrics -16.1%, Upholstery fabrics -22.6%.
news.summary: Culp, Inc. (NYSE: CULP) announced its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year which concluded on April 28, 2024. In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, the company recorded a net sales figure of $49.5 million, marking a 19.4 percent decrease from the same period last year. Within this, sales of mattress fabrics experienced a 16.1 percent decline and upholstery fabrics sales dropped by 22.6 percent. The company reported a loss from operations in the same quarter.

news.headline: Nike reports $51.4 billion in revenues for fiscal 2024, up 1%. Q4 revenues: $12.6 billion, down 2%. Direct revenues: $5.1 billion, down 8%.
news.summary: In its fiscal 2024 fourth quarter and full year ended on May 31, 2024, NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) from Beaverton, Ore., disclosed its financial results. The full-year revenues amounted to $51.4 billion, showing a slight increase from the prior year's $51.2 billion, representing a 1 percent rise on a currency-neutral basis. Fourth-quarter revenues reached $12.6 billion, reflecting a 2 percent decline on a reported basis but remaining flat on a currency-neutral basis. NIKE Direct revenues for the fourth quarter totaled $5.1 billion, marking an 8 percent decrease on a reported basis.

news.headline: Chatham Lodging Trust to hold Q2 2024 earnings call on Aug 2, 2024 in West Palm Beach, Florida.
news.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust has disclosed that its second quarter earnings call for 2024 is scheduled to take place on Friday, August 2nd. This announcement was made from West Palm Beach, Florida.

news.headline: World Kinect Corp (NYSE: WKC) to hold Q2 2024 earnings call on July 25 at 5:00 p.m. ET. Results to be released post-market close. Visit ir.worldkinect.com for webcast.
news.summary: Miami-based World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) is holding a conference call on Thursday, July 25, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET to review the company's performance in the second quarter of 2024. The results will be released after the market closes on the same day. To join the discussion and view forward-looking insights, participants can tune into the live webcast on the company's website at ir.worldkinect.com/events. World Kinect encourages all interested parties to engage in this interactive session with its management team.

news.headline: WesBanco (Nasdaq: WSBC) declares quarterly cash dividend on 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock.
news.summary: Today, in Wheeling, West Virginia, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq:WSBC), a diversified bank holding company operating in multiple states, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend for the holders of its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock.

news.headline: Tenorshare releases iCarefone Recorder iOS app for recording and managing phone calls in multiple languages.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in New York, Tenorshare, a prominent provider of software solutions, revealed the introduction of iCareFone Recorder: Call Record. This innovative iOS application aims to revolutionize the way individuals record and handle phone conversations. The app is accessible in various languages, providing users with a seamless experience.

news.headline: HitPaw releases Voice Changer V1.9.0 with AI technology, redefining sound transformation. Another step into the future.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, HitPaw, a leading software technology company, introduced its latest software, the HitPaw Voice Changer. This innovative tool promises to revolutionize sound manipulation, providing users with the ability to experiment with limitless possibilities. The software can be accessed at https://www.hitpaw.com/voice-changer.html.

news.headline: Kite Realty Group Trust releases annual Corporate Responsibility Report focusing on ESG practices, goals, and initiatives.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Kite Realty Group Trust (NYSE: KRG) unveiled its latest Corporate Responsibility Report, highlighting its environmental, social, and governance (ESG) strategies. This annual report delves into the company's ESG practices, policies, and progress. It showcases key metrics, advancements, and case studies demonstrating KRG's commitment to sustainable business practices.

news.headline: Ashford Hospitality Trust sells One Ocean Resort in Atlantic Beach, Florida; 193-room property sold for debt repayment.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) disclosed the completion of the sale of the 193-room One Ocean Resort in Atlantic Beach, Florida. The company confirmed that all the funds acquired from this sale will be allocated towards debt repayment.

news.headline: $80,000 in college scholarships awarded by California Water Service Group to support local communities.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, which is a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.5%. The report further stated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, exceeding analysts' expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a 3% increase following this positive economic news. Experts are optimistic about the future economic growth and job market stability.

news.headline: Cousins Properties to report Q2 earnings on July 25, 2024, with conference call on July 26, 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta-based real estate company Cousins Properties (NYSE:CUZ) is scheduled to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on July 25, 2024, after the markets close. Following this, on July 26, 2024, the company will conduct its earnings conference call to discuss the performance. This announcement signifies an important forthcoming event for investors and analysts tracking the company's progress in the market.

news.headline: Law firm investigating Axos Financial for securities law violations in June 2024. Stock symbol: AX. Shareholders affected.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading national firm specializing in shareholder rights litigation, disclosed that it is looking into allegations concerning investors who hold shares in Axos Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AX). The investigation revolves around potential misconduct related to the Company.

news.headline: Stifel Financial Corp reported May 2024 operating data, providing key performance metrics for investors.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) released key operating results for May 31, 2024 to offer investors important performance insights. It's crucial to note that these metrics provide limited data and may not directly correlate with earnings.

news.headline: Keurig Dr Pepper to report Q2 2024 results on July 25 before market opens. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: BURLINGTON, Massachusetts, and FRISCO, Texas - Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. is scheduled to announce its financial results for Q2 ended on June 30, 2024, before the market opens on July 25, 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ as KDP, will be hosting a conference call as well.

news.headline: LXP Industrial Trust (NYSE: LXP) to release Q2 2024 results on July 31st, and host conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on June 27, 2024, LXP Industrial Trust (NYSE: LXP), a REIT specializing in Class A warehouse and distribution real estate investments, revealed plans to unveil its Q2 2024 financial results on the morning of Wednesday, July 31, 2024. The company will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into these results. Those interested can join the call and webcast through the provided details.

news.headline: Michigan-based Lineage Inc. files for IPO seeking $3B and valuing company at $30B. Estimated raise of $3.5B through IPO.
news.summary: Correction has been made to the founding timeline of Lineage Inc. as presented in an updated article. The temperature-controlled storage and logistics firm recently submitted paperwork for its initial public offering (IPO), becoming the most recent Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) to enter the public stock market. A report from Crain’s Detroit Business announced this development on Thursday. Headquartered in Novi, Michigan, Lineage aims to raise $3 billion through the IPO, potentially leading to a valuation exceeding $30 billion. Renaissance Capital projected that the company could gather approximately $3.5 billion from the IPO. Notably, Lineage currently boasts 482...

news.headline: LuxUrban Hotels appoints Patrick McNamee to board of directors. Brian Ferdinand resigns from board.
news.summary: Brian Ferdinand has officially resigned from the board of the company. This announcement comes as a surprise to many, as Ferdinand has been serving on the board for a significant period of time. His resignation will leave a vacancy that the company will need to fill in the upcoming board meeting. Ferdinand's departure will impact the board's composition, as he was a key member contributing to important decisions. The company's board will now consist of X members following this resignation. Ferdinand's absence will be felt in future board meetings and strategic planning sessions.

news.headline: Discover Financial Services (NYSE: DFS) to release 2nd quarter 2024 earnings on July 17, 2024, conference call on July 18, 2024 at 7:00 am CT.
news.summary: Discover Financial Services, listed on NYSE as DFS, is set to announce its Q2 2024 financial results post-market closure on July 17, 2024. The earnings report will be accessible via Discover's Investor Relations site. Following this, a conference call has been scheduled for July 18, 2024, at 7:00 a.m. CT, limited to prepared remarks, to discuss results, outlook, and other pertinent topics. For further details, visit https://investorrelations.discover.com.

news.headline: Aethlon Medical reports fiscal year ended March 31, 2024 with $9.1 million cash balance. Updates include approval for clinical trials using Hemopurifier in cancer patients. Financials show $12.2 million net loss for the year. Call scheduled for June 27, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Aethlon Medical reported its financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2024, with a cash balance of about $9.1 million as of June 25, 2024. The company is advancing the Hemopurifier, a blood filtration system for cancer and infectious diseases. They received approval for a clinical trial in Australia to study the Hemopurifier's effects in cancer patients on anti-PD-1 treatment. The company is also conducting a COVID-19 trial in India. Despite a net loss of $12.2 million in FY2024, the company's financials show operating expenses of $12.6 million, with increases in payroll costs offset by decreases in other areas. The conference call to discuss these updates will be held on June 27, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.headline: View Bloomberg Equality for insights on the 2024 US Election.
Biopic 'The Apprentice' about Donald J. Trump close to distribution deal despite backlash from his allies.
news.summary: Critics have heavily slammed "The Apprentice," a fictionalized account detailing the background of Donald J. Trump. The show has received backlash from the ex-president and his supporters.

news.headline: Exro Technologies receives UL Certification for Cell Driver™ Energy Storage and launches Cellex Energy Inc.
news.summary: Exro Technologies Inc., a prominent clean-technology company based in Calgary, Alberta, has announced significant developments on June 27, 2024. Listed on the TSX as EXRO and OTCQB as EXROF, the company specializes in proprietary propulsion system technology for e-mobility and exclusive battery control technology for stationary energy solutions.

news.headline: ESLS market to grow by $1.64 billion from 2024-2028, with CAGR of 15.69% due to in-store technology implementation.
news.summary: According to a report by Technavio released on June 27, 2024, the electronic shelf label (ESL) market is projected to increase by approximately USD 1641 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 15.69% during this period. This growth is attributed to the widespread adoption of in-store technologies...
